descriptionText: If you are looking for a reliable and well-maintained cruising yacht, the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 could be a good choice.This Oceanis 50 is presented in good condition and represents a practical and comfortable yacht for coastal cruising or longer passages. The boat features an owner’s version layout, with 2 cabins and 2 bathrooms, both equipped with electrical toilets, providing smart comfort for her size. The accommodation plan suits couples or small families looking for space and privacy onboard.Here are the main specifications and features of the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008:General Dimensions:LOA: 15.10 mBeam: 4.49 mDraft: 2.10 mHull and Propulsion:Shaft driveDiesel engineMotor: Yanmar 4jh4-hte, 110 PSTank Capacities:Fuel: 235 litresWater: 565 litres in two tanksCategory:Category A (suitable for extended voyages offshore)Electrical Equipment:2 shore power inlets (one for air conditioning, one for normal use)GeneratorElectronics (Raymarine and Furuno):DepthsounderRadarLog-SpeedWindspeedTV setChartplotterAutopilotGPSVHF radioNavtex (Furuno)Electronic chain counter for anchorAdditional Equipment:Bow thruster (helps with manoeuvring in tight spaces)Electrical bilge pumpOven and microwaveAir conditioningRefrigerator and deep freezerBattery chargerSails and Rigging:Furling mainsail (Elvström)Furling genoa (Elvström)Deck and Safety:Cockpit showerNew anchor chain (12mm, 70m)Liferaft for 8 persons (expiry 03-2024)Tender:Dinghy equipped with 4hp Yamaha 4-stroke engineOverall, the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 combines solid performance with user-friendly features, making her suitable for both experienced sailors and those looking for a straightforward, comfortable yacht. The presence of a bow thruster adds ease in harbour handling, and the range of navigational equipment supports safe and confident cruising. With fairly generous tank capacities, she is prepared for longer trips without the need for frequent visits to marinas.Located in Marzamemi, one of the charming harbours in Sicily, the yacht is available for visits and sea trials, allowing prospective buyers to assess her condition and performance firsthand. This is a practical and direct way to make an informed decision.If your plans include a spacious and well-equipped yacht for Mediterranean adventures or further cruising, this Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 deserves a close look. descriptionHtml:
If you are looking for a reliable and well-maintained cruising yacht, the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 could be a good choice.

This Oceanis 50 is presented in good condition and represents a practical and comfortable yacht for coastal cruising or longer passages. The boat features an owner’s version layout, with 2 cabins and 2 bathrooms, both equipped with electrical toilets, providing smart comfort for her size. The accommodation plan suits couples or small families looking for space and privacy onboard.

Here are the main specifications and features of the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008:

General Dimensions:

  • LOA: 15.10 m
  • Beam: 4.49 m
  • Draft: 2.10 m

Hull and Propulsion:

  • Shaft drive
  • Diesel engine
  • Motor: Yanmar 4jh4-hte, 110 PS

Tank Capacities:

  • Fuel: 235 litres
  • Water: 565 litres in two tanks

Category:

  • Category A (suitable for extended voyages offshore)

Electrical Equipment:

  • 2 shore power inlets (one for air conditioning, one for normal use)
  • Generator

Electronics (Raymarine and Furuno):

  • Depthsounder
  • Radar
  • Log-Speed
  • Windspeed
  • TV set
  • Chartplotter
  • Autopilot
  • GPS
  • VHF radio
  • Navtex (Furuno)
  • Electronic chain counter for anchor

Additional Equipment:

  • Bow thruster (helps with manoeuvring in tight spaces)
  • Electrical bilge pump
  • Oven and microwave
  • Air conditioning
  • Refrigerator and deep freezer
  • Battery charger

Sails and Rigging:

  • Furling mainsail (Elvström)
  • Furling genoa (Elvström)

Deck and Safety:

  • Cockpit shower
  • New anchor chain (12mm, 70m)
  • Liferaft for 8 persons (expiry 03-2024)

Tender:

  • Dinghy equipped with 4hp Yamaha 4-stroke engine

Overall, the Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 combines solid performance with user-friendly features, making her suitable for both experienced sailors and those looking for a straightforward, comfortable yacht. The presence of a bow thruster adds ease in harbour handling, and the range of navigational equipment supports safe and confident cruising. With fairly generous tank capacities, she is prepared for longer trips without the need for frequent visits to marinas.

Located in Marzamemi, one of the charming harbours in Sicily, the yacht is available for visits and sea trials, allowing prospective buyers to assess her condition and performance firsthand. This is a practical and direct way to make an informed decision.

If your plans include a spacious and well-equipped yacht for Mediterranean adventures or further cruising, this Beneteau Oceanis 50 for sale 2008 deserves a close look. Contact us for more details or to book your viewing
